dir_convention.roll+: roll the wrist to the left
dir_convention.roll-: roll the wrist to the right

train: move the gripper slightly forward
move the arm a little forward
shift the end effector a bit forward
push the hand slightly forward
slide the gripper a little forward
bring the arm a bit forward
holdout: nudge the hand forward just a touch

train: move the gripper a lot forward
move the arm far forward
shift the end effector a long distance forward
push the hand a lot forward
slide the gripper far forward
bring the arm a long distance forward
holdout: advance the hand a great deal toward the front
drive the gripper firmly ahead

train: move the gripper slightly backward
move the arm a little backward
shift the end effector a bit backward
push the hand slightly backward
slide the gripper a little backward
bring the arm a bit backward
holdout: ease the gripper back a tiny bit

train: move the gripper a lot backward
move the arm far backward
shift the end effector a long distance backward
push the hand a lot backward
slide the gripper far backward
bring the arm a long distance backward
holdout: pull the arm way back

train: move the gripper slightly to the left
move the arm a little to the left
shift the end effector a bit to the left
push the hand slightly to the left
slide the gripper a little to the left
bring the arm a bit to the left
holdout: scoot the hand left a smidge
drift the hand slightly leftward

train: move the gripper a lot to the left
move the arm far to the left
shift the end effector a long distance to the left
push the hand a lot to the left
slide the gripper far to the left
bring the arm a long distance to the left
holdout: swing the arm out wide to the left side

train: move the gripper slightly to the right
move the arm a little to the right
shift the end effector a bit to the right
push the hand slightly to the right
slide the gripper a little to the right
bring the arm a bit to the right
holdout: inch the arm over to the right

train: move the gripper a lot to the right
move the arm far to the right
shift the end effector a long distance to the right
push the hand a lot to the right
slide the gripper far to the right
bring the arm a long distance to the right
holdout: sweep the gripper right across the table

train: move the gripper slightly upward
move the arm a little upward
shift the end effector a bit upward
push the hand slightly upward
slide the gripper a little upward
bring the arm a bit upward
holdout: lift the gripper up a touch

train: move the gripper a lot upward
move the arm far upward
shift the end effector a long distance upward
push the hand a lot upward
slide the gripper far upward
bring the arm a long distance upward
holdout: raise the hand high up

train: move the gripper slightly downward
move the arm a little downward
shift the end effector a bit downward
push the hand slightly downward
slide the gripper a little downward
bring the arm a bit downward
holdout: lower the hand a hair closer to the table
descend gently toward the surface

train: move the gripper a lot downward
move the arm far downward
shift the end effector a long distance downward
push the hand a lot downward
slide the gripper far downward
bring the arm a long distance downward
holdout: drop the arm all the way down

train: roll the wrist to the left slightly
roll the wrist to the left a little
roll the wrist to the left a bit
roll the wrist to the left a lot
roll the wrist to the left far
roll the wrist to the left a long distance
holdout: rotate the wrist strongly leftward

train: roll the wrist to the right slightly
roll the wrist to the right a little
roll the wrist to the right a bit
roll the wrist to the right a lot
roll the wrist to the right far
roll the wrist to the right a long distance
tilt the wrist up slightly
tilt the wrist up a little
tilt the wrist up a bit
tilt the wrist up a lot
tilt the wrist up far
tilt the wrist up a long distance
tilt the wrist down slightly
tilt the wrist down a little
tilt the wrist down a bit
tilt the wrist down a lot
tilt the wrist down far
tilt the wrist down a long distance
holdout: angle the wrist sharply downward

train: turn the wrist counterclockwise slightly
turn the wrist counterclockwise a little
turn the wrist counterclockwise a bit
turn the wrist counterclockwise a lot
turn the wrist counterclockwise far
turn the wrist counterclockwise a long distance
holdout: spin the wrist a good amount counterclockwise

train: turn the wrist clockwise slightly
turn the wrist clockwise a little
turn the wrist clockwise a bit
turn the wrist clockwise a lot
turn the wrist clockwise far
turn the wrist clockwise a long distance
close the gripper
grasp with the gripper
shut the gripper fingers
holdout: clamp the fingers shut

train: open the gripper
let go with the gripper
spread the gripper fingers
holdout: release the grasp
